title: 6ix9ine walks free after jail term, Adin Ross livestream resurfaces online
summary_full: Rapper 6ix9ine has been released from jail after serving three months for probation violations, including drug possession and assault. His surrender, livestreamed with Adin Ross, has resurfaced, highlighting his continued ability to generate viral attention. Upon release, he showcased a diamond chain and a SpongeBob toy signed by Nicolás Maduro.
